text:
{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <ADVERTISING_TEXT>In der Hoch-Obrigkeitl. Buchtruckerey zu Bern und folgende Bücher in gar geringem Preis zu haben:</ADVERTISING_TEXT>
    <BIBL>
        <AUTHOR>J. H. Ringieri</AUTHOR>
        <TITLE>CX. Conciones de Cena Dominic.</TITLE>
        <VOLUME>3. Vol.</VOLUME>
        <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>
        <YEAR>1680</YEAR>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>bz.</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>das Eremplar in albo achthalben</AMOUNT>
        </PRICE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <AUTHOR>Rissenii</AUTHOR>
        <TITLE>Summa Theolog.</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>in 8vo.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>
        <YEAR>1703</YEAR>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>10</AMOUNT>
        </PRICE>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>14</AMOUNT>
            <DESCRIPTION>auff Schreib-papier</DESCRIPTION>
        </PRICE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <AUTHOR>Rodolphi</AUTHOR>
        <TITLE>Compend. Theol. Christ</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>
        <YEAR>1713</YEAR>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>8</AMOUNT>
        </PRICE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <AUTHOR>Altmanns</AUTHOR>
        <TITLE>Carechetischer Leuchter und Rauchwerk, d. i. Erklärung und Gebet über den Heidelberger Catechismus</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>
        <YEAR>1711</YEAR>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>15 und ein halber Bogen</AMOUNT>
        </PRICE>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>5</AMOUNT>
        </PRICE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Biblia Piscatoris</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>in 4to.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Rein</PLACE>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>15</AMOUNT>
        </PRICE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <AUTHOR>Seelmatters</AUTHOR>
        <TITLE>Ewig-vest-bestehender Berg Zion, oder: der vest-gegründete unüberwindliche Gnaden-Stand der Kinderen GOttes,</TITLE>
        <DESCRIPTION>gründlich vorgestellt über die Worte des 125. Psalms</DESCRIPTION>
        <FORMAT>9.1.</FORMAT>
        <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>
        <YEAR>1704</YEAR>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>5</AMOUNT>
        </PRICE>
    </BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":18,"explanation":"1. Added XML declaration at the top.
2. Added missing root-level text for the introductory sentence: `<ADVERTISING_TEXT>`.
3. Fixed malformed `<PRIZE>` tags to `<PRICE>` tags.
4. Structured `<PRICE>` tags with `<CURRENCY>` and `<AMOUNT>` sub-tags for clarity and consistency.
5. Fixed and normalized author names (e.g., 'J. H Ringieri' to 'J. H. Ringieri').
6. Corrected and normalized title text (e.g., 'Carechetischer Le�bacher' to 'Carechetischer Leuchter').
7. Fixed and normalized special characters (e.g., 'B�tz' to 'Batzen').
8. Added missing `<DESCRIPTION>` tag for the additional information in the 6th book.
9. Fixed and normalized `<FORMAT>` tags (e.g., '9. 1.' and '8vo.' are kept as separate entries).
10. Corrected malformed tag: `<PRICE>` to `<PRIZE>` in the 6th book was corrected to `<PRICE>`.
11. Added missing closing tag for `<PLACE>` in the 3rd book.
12. Normalized and corrected the text within `<PRICE>` tags for consistency.
13. Added proper structure for multiple prices in the 2nd and 4th books.
14. Added `<DESCRIPTION>` tag for additional notes in the 2nd and 4th books.
15. Fixed and normalized the text for the 5th book's price.
16. Fixed and normalized the text for the 6th book's description.
17. Ensured all tags are properly closed.
18. Improved readability and consistency of formatting."}

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <ADVERTISING_TEXT>In der Hoch-Obrigkeitl. Buchtruckerey zu Bern und folgende Bücher in gar geringem Preis zu haben:</ADVERTISING_TEXT>

        <VOLUME>3. Vol.</VOLUME>
        <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>
        <YEAR>1680</YEAR>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>bz.</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>das Eremplar in albo achthalben</AMOUNT>

    <BIBL>
        <AUTHOR>Rissenii</AUTHOR>

        <FORMAT>in 8vo.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>
        <YEAR>1703</YEAR>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>10</AMOUNT>
        </PRICE>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>14</AMOUNT>
            <DESCRIPTION>auff Schreib-papier</DESCRIPTION>
        </PRICE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <AUTHOR>Rodolphi</AUTHOR>
        <TITLE>Compend. Theol. Christ</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>
        <YEAR>1713</YEAR>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>8</AMOUNT>
        </PRICE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <AUTHOR>Altmanns</AUTHOR>
        <TITLE>Carechetischer Leuchter und Rauchwerk, d. i. Erklärung und Gebet über den Heidelberger Catechismus</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>
        <YEAR>1711</YEAR>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>15 und ein halber Bogen</AMOUNT>
        </PRICE>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>

    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Biblia Piscatoris</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>in 4to.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Rein</PLACE>
        <PRICE>

        <TITLE>Ewig-vest-bestehender Berg Zion, oder: der vest-gegründete unüberwindliche Gnaden-Stand der Kinderen GOttes,</TITLE>
        <DESCRIPTION>gründlich vorgestellt über die Worte des 125. Psalms</DESCRIPTION>
        <FORMAT>9.1.</FORMAT>
        <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
        <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>
        <YEAR>1704</YEAR>
        <PRICE>
            <CURRENCY>Batzen</CURRENCY>
            <AMOUNT>5</AMOUNT>
        </PRICE>
    </BIBL>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Added XML declaration at the top.
2. Added missing root-level text for the introductory sentence: `<ADVERTISING_TEXT>`.
3. Fixed malformed `<PRIZE>` tags to `<PRICE>` tags.
4. Structured `<PRICE>` tags with `<CURRENCY>` and `<AMOUNT>` sub-tags for clarity and consistency.
5. Fixed and normalized author names (e.g., 'J. H Ringieri' to 'J. H. Ringieri').
6. Corrected and normalized title text (e.g., 'Carechetischer Le�bacher' to 'Carechetischer Leuchter').
7. Fixed and normalized special characters (e.g., 'B�tz' to 'Batzen').
8. Added missing `<DESCRIPTION>` tag for the additional information in the 6th book.
9. Fixed and normalized `<FORMAT>` tags (e.g., '9. 1.' and '8vo.' are kept as separate entries).
10. Corrected malformed tag: `<PRICE>` to `<PRIZE>` in the 6th book was corrected to `<PRICE>`.
11. Added missing closing tag for `<PLACE>` in the 3rd book.
12. Normalized and corrected the text within `<PRICE>` tags for consistency.
13. Added proper structure for multiple prices in the 2nd and 4th books.
14. Added `<DESCRIPTION>` tag for additional notes in the 2nd and 4th books.
15. Fixed and normalized the text for the 5th book's price.
16. Fixed and normalized the text for the 6th book's description.
17. Ensured all tags are properly closed.
18. Improved readability and consistency of formatting.
